name: kepu-magazine
description: 少年科普杂志 - 每日更新科普知识

scripts.build: pip install jinja2 markdown Pillow -q && python3 scripts/page_builder.py
scripts.build:android: python3 scripts/page_builder.py && npx cap sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.build:android:debug: python3 scripts/page_builder.py && npx cap sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
